extraction_status: ✅ 已从 Markdown 教材提取

methods.name: 即时动手实验 (Snap Lab)
methods.description: 每节内容嵌入可快速完成的动手实验，使用家中常见材料即可操作。学生在阅读过程中边学边做，通过亲身体验建立物理直觉。
methods.example: Snap Lab: Distance vs. Displacement — 用音乐播放器+卷尺+胶带，让学生在房间里走动并测量路径距离与起终点位移的区别。
methods.source_evidence: HS Physics: 'Snap Labs give students the opportunity to experience physics through hands-on activities. The labs can be completed quickly and rely primarily on readily available materials so that students can do them at home as they read.'

methods.name: 四段式解题法（情境-策略-解法-讨论）
methods.description: 物理例题采用四段式结构：先描述应用情境(Scenario)、再阐述解题策略(Strategy)及背后的概念、然后给出完整数学解法(Solution)、最后讨论结果的合理性(Discussion)。
methods.example: Worked Example: 开车回家 → Scenario: 10km/20min → Strategy: 用v=d/t再单位换算 → Solution: 30km/h=8.33m/s → Discussion: 数值合理，城市行车速度
methods.source_evidence: HS Physics: 'In each example, the scenario/application is first introduced, followed by a description of the strategy used to solve the problem that emphasizes the concepts involved. These are followed by a fully worked mathematical solution and a discussion of the results.'

methods.name: PhET 虚拟物理沙盒
methods.description: 使用科罗拉多大学开发的 PhET 交互式模拟，让学生在虚拟环境中实验物理场景。提供探究发现式学习，学生可以自由调节参数观察结果。
methods.example: Virtual Physics: 使用力学模拟器调整质量和力的大小，观察加速度变化，验证F=ma。
methods.source_evidence: HS Physics: 'Virtual Physics: Provide inquiry and discovery-based learning by providing a virtual sandbox where students can experiment with simulated physics scenarios and equipment using the University of Colorado-developed PhET simulations.'

methods.name: 跨学科链接 (Links to Physics)
methods.description: 在物理内容中标注与其他学科（数学、化学、生物、工程）的关联，帮助学生建立知识的横向连接。
methods.example: 力学中的F=ma链接到数学的线性函数（F与a成正比）；热力学链接到化学反应能量。
methods.source_evidence: HS Physics: 'Links to Physics: Highlight connections of physics to other disciplines.'

methods.name: 趣味物理 (Fun in Physics)
methods.description: 展示物理在娱乐行业中的应用（电影特效、游乐场过山车、运动科学），增强学生对物理的兴趣和认同感。
methods.example: 过山车设计中的能量守恒：势能在最高点最大，动能在最低点最大，总机械能不变（忽略摩擦）。
methods.source_evidence: HS Physics: 'Fun in Physics: Features physics applications in various entertainment industries.'

methods.name: 前沿物理 (Boundless Physics)
methods.description: 介绍物理学前沿发现和突破性成就（如罗塞塔号登陆彗星），展示物理学的活力和持续发展，激发学生对科学探索的向往。
methods.example: Boundless Physics: 2014年罗塞塔号首次着陆彗星，展示万有引力在极端环境中的表现。
methods.source_evidence: HS Physics: 'Boundless Physics: Reveal frontiers in physical knowledge and descriptions of cutting-edge discoveries in physics.'

methods.name: 参考系对比活动
methods.description: 让学生亲身体验从不同参考系观察同一运动事件的区别。两人一组，一人运动一人观察，交换角色对比描述。
methods.example: Snap Lab: 两个参考系看运动 — 一个同学扔篮球并走动，另一个同学站着观察。从走动者视角，球是直线下落；从站立者视角，球是抛物线。
methods.source_evidence: HS Physics Ch2 Snap Lab: 'In this activity you will look at motion from two reference frames. Which reference frame is correct?'

methods.name: 可汗学院视频辅助
methods.description: 每节后链接 Khan Academy 视频教程，用不同讲解风格和视角巩固概念。视觉+听觉双通道加深理解。
methods.example: Watch Physics: 矢量与标量的介绍视频，用动画展示矢量加法的平行四边形法则。
methods.source_evidence: HS Physics: 'Watch Physics: Support student's understanding of conceptual and computational skills using videos from Khan Academy.'
